personal.name: Eric Wimsatt
personal.tagline: Software Engineer · React · TypeScript · Python · C++
personal.summary: Ex-Roblox engineer who joined at ~800 people and left at ~2500. Looking to join a smaller startup where I can own larger parts of the product and move fast.

experience.description: Following a car accident, focused on rehabilitation and worked on personal projects.
Worked on the mobile application lifecycle and core user interfaces.
highlights: Halved time-to-interactive on startup by optimizing the network requests required to start the app.
2% improvement in app startup success rate by adding retry mechanisms to common failure points.
Improved game-join success rate by 4% by identifying failure cases, redesigning routes, and adding in-game toasts to reduce user confusion.

experience.description: Research to improve performance of bulk genome sequencing on the MetaHipMer project; attempted a GPU implementation of a memory-efficient bloom filter.
Collaborative platform for identifying misinformation. Created the data systems and led a team to optimize the process.
highlights: Designed a framework for measuring consensus among text annotators, extending the existing standard to factor in annotators' selected text alongside question responses. The framework continues to be widely utilized in academic research.

projects.name: bulk-refactor
projects.description: CLI toolkit that applies repetitive structural changes across an entire codebase using deterministic string manipulation, with AI agent fallback for complex cases.

projects.name: manhunt
projects.description: Real-time companion web app for organizing and playing a city-scale game of manhunt in Golden Gate Park.

projects.name: rockets
projects.description: Fork of the Treys poker library extended to support more advanced simulations including Pot-Limit Omaha evaluation and deck seeding.

projects.name: pseudo
projects.description: Plain-English code viewer that lets non-technical people read a codebase without relying on AI summaries. [WIP]

projects.name: gamble
projects.description: Python tools for analyzing poker hand equity and improving decision-making at the table.
